mapper.select: SELECT FROM registration_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY is_staff DESC, create_time ASC
SELECT FROM registration_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND is_staff = TRUE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO registration_group_member ( group_id, registration_id, is_staff, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.groupId}, #{item.registrationId}, #{item.isStaff}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND is_staff = TRUE
